name: HockeyStack

auth.notes: Official docs expose product/admin and tracking-oriented docs; third-party dlt context describes Bearer-token account-intelligence access, but no official public server API auth reference was found.

notes: Official docs expose llms.txt and extensive product/integration docs for Revenue Agents, Account Intelligence, Marketing Intelligence, data warehouse connections, and tracking-style analytics concepts.
A third-party dlt source describes an account-intelligence API, but official public API reference, pagination, rate limits, and schema contract remain unresolved.
reviewReason: Need an official public HockeyStack server API reference covering auth, endpoints, pagination, rate limits, and destructive/write semantics; current public coverage is product docs plus non-official API context.
